header.title: Skill Library
header.sub: Scans the local claude / codex / kiro / agents skill sources, plus skills uploaded to Studio

upload.tooLarge: The zip is {{size}}MB, over the 50MB limit.

empty.noSkillsHint: None of the four local skill sources contain a directory with a SKILL.md — upload a skill zip to get started.

detail.binary: Binary file ({{size}}) — cannot preview; use “Download” at the top right.
detail.truncated: File too large; preview truncated ({{size}}) — download for the full content.
